HOWEVER: ADX-14 at 84.15 signals a runaway trend — the strongest possible counter-signal for a fade. The daily Bollinger pct_b is 0.869, still inside the upper band (upper at $385.50), meaning price has not yet pierced the upper band. Today's read is marginally less extreme (z-score 2.34 vs 2.54) but essentially unchanged. Branch B (dip buy): not applicable — price is at recent highs, no pullback setup. Full mean reversion to 50-SMA ($299) is not a 20-day target given the runaway trend.
